questions.text: Is AI ever used in any part of development, including writing or planning code, ideating, or anything else?
questions.note: Count anything that AI was used for anywhere in the development process.

questions.text: How often has AI been used in your project?
questions.note: This is fairly subjective, but try to use the “20%” rule: if you believe your AI usage impacts more than ~20% of your work, it’s frequent.

options.text: Occasional usage across the entire project
Frequent usage across the entire project
Difficult to know, but AI was never used for entire features
Difficult to know, but AI has been used for entire features

questions.text: What was the role of AI in your project?
questions.note: If the AI ever wrote code itself, it counts as implementation. Other uses of AI count as planning.

options.text: AI was used for both implementation and planning
Unsure, I just prompted AI to do what I want

questions.text: What was the scope of AI usage?
questions.note: Anything that does not impact the user experience counts as backend, including prototyping, CI/CD, utility modules, etc. Anything else is in-experience.
